---
number-sections: false
---

# Practice 10: Clustering and Organization {#ch-practice-10 .unnumbered}

**Theory connection:** [Volume I, Chapter 10](../chapters/10-clustering.qmd)

Use this chapter as the practical companion to the corresponding theory chapter.
Recovered activities are linked where a strong match exists; other sections are
explicit development scaffolds for the next writing cycle.

## Example Data {#sec-pr-10-example-data}

Recovered starting point: [Text and Cluster Analysis](labs/clustering.qmd#sec-lab-clustering).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

## Hierarchical Clustering {#sec-pr-10-hierarchical-clustering}

Recovered starting point: [Text and Cluster Analysis](labs/clustering.qmd#sec-lab-clustering).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

### Issues of HAC {#sec-pr-10-issues-of-hac}

Recovered starting point: [Text and Cluster Analysis](labs/clustering.qmd#sec-lab-clustering).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

## K-means Partitioning {#sec-pr-10-k-means-partitioning}

Recovered starting point: [Text and Cluster Analysis](labs/clustering.qmd#sec-lab-clustering).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

### Issues of K-means {#sec-pr-10-issues-of-k-means}

Recovered starting point: [Text and Cluster Analysis](labs/clustering.qmd#sec-lab-clustering).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

## Probabilistic Clustering {#sec-pr-10-probabilistic-clustering}

Recovered starting point: [Text and Cluster Analysis](labs/clustering.qmd#sec-lab-clustering).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

### Initialization {#sec-pr-10-initialization}

Recovered starting point: [Text and Cluster Analysis](labs/clustering.qmd#sec-lab-clustering).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

### Expectation {#sec-pr-10-expectation}

Recovered starting point: [Text and Cluster Analysis](labs/clustering.qmd#sec-lab-clustering).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

### Maximization {#sec-pr-10-maximization}

Recovered starting point: [Text and Cluster Analysis](labs/clustering.qmd#sec-lab-clustering).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

### Iterations of Expection-Maximization {#sec-pr-10-iterations-of-expection-maximization}

Recovered starting point: [Text and Cluster Analysis](labs/clustering.qmd#sec-lab-clustering).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

### EM with Higher Dimensionality {#sec-pr-10-em-with-higher-dimensionality}

Recovered starting point: [Text and Cluster Analysis](labs/clustering.qmd#sec-lab-clustering).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.
